description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Sleep.csv' is already open in Jamovi. This dataset contains data from a classic sleep study (Student/Gosset 1908) with 20 participants assigned to two groups, measuring extra hours of sleep gained ('extra' column, group assignment in 'group' column). Generate descriptive statistics for the 'extra' variable split by 'group', including the Mean, Median, Standard Deviation, Minimum, and Maximum. Additionally, generate a histogram for the data.
